title: fraxinus excelsior var. monophylla
intro: Fraxinus excelsior var. monophylla, also known as the single-leaved ash, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the common ash tree. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Fraxinus excelsior var. monophylla include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herb for those seeking natural remedies. Fraxinus excelsior var. monophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for various health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
